appliedUpdates.description: Added NATS_CONFIG_V2 environment variable documentation to .factory/library/environment.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update go-library-worker SKILL.md step 4 to clarify that server/ integration features are allowed. The current rule 'Never modify files outside conf/v2/' contradicts features like env-var-config-v2-switch that require modifying server/opts.go and server/reload.go. Suggested wording: 'For conf/v2 library features, keep changes within conf/v2/. For server integration features (milestone server-v2-config and config-v2-switch), changes to server/ files are expected.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature env-var-config-v2-switch required modifying server/opts.go and server/reload.go. Worker deviated from skill step 4 and noted it in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges. The go-library-worker skill description mentions 'server integration' but the procedure's hard rule contradicts this.
